description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a tan and black color scheme. The body is constructed from a combination of metal and polymer, with a prominent handguard and a long, cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. A compact optical sight is mounted on the top rail, enhancing aiming precision. The stock is skeletonized, providing reduced weight and a contemporary appearance. The overall build suggests a weapon designed for urban operations, balancing maneuverability and firepower.
description: A modern tan and black tactical rifle with a suppressor, skeletonized stock, optical sight, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor and the alignment of the sight along the barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the skeletonized stock, pistol grip, magazine, and optical sight.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the sight, with the suppressor visible at the far end.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the magazine, handguard, and the full length of the suppressor and stock.
